meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no version control (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: SaaS Pricing & Version Control for AI Apps
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing and fix your lack of version control. A pro-level guide for AI Builders using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop losing client trust to manual file handling. You solve 'no version control' by integrating automated Git workflows into your SaaS pricing architecture. By using Antigravity to scaffold your infrastructure and Claude Code for iterative updates, you ensure every pricing tier is versioned, repeatable, and ready for production deployment.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a folder of 'final_v2_real_final' files, terrified that a single misplaced line of code will collapse your client’s entire pricing engine. The silence of an un-versioned project is the sound of a ticking time bomb. Every manual deployment is a gamble with your reputation, and frankly, you’re too talented to be held hostage by your own file management.

But the tide is turning. By merging robust SaaS pricing logic with modern version control automation, you transform from a frantic freelancer into a high-leverage AI architect. This guide pulls back the curtain on using Antigravity and Claude Code to automate your workflow, ensuring your pricing models are as resilient as they are profitable.

steps.title: Initialize Version-Controlled Infrastructure
steps.description: Establish a clean repository baseline so your pricing logic never drifts from your production environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a clean SaaS project structure with Git initialization and a standard .gitignore for Node.js and Python environments.

steps.title: Define Modular Pricing Schemas
steps.description: Decouple pricing logic from the UI using a schema-first approach to allow for rapid client adjustments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON-based pricing schema that supports multi-tier subscriptions and usage-based billing logic.

steps.title: Implement Atomic Commits for Logic Changes
steps.description: Every pricing update must be an atomic commit to ensure you can revert to a stable state instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pre-commit hook that validates pricing schema integrity before allowing a git commit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message="feat: implement tier-based pricing logic"

steps.title: Automate Deployment Verification
steps.description: Use Claude Code to verify that your new pricing logic hasn't introduced regressions in the checkout flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite that simulates a user checkout process for all defined pricing tiers.

steps.title: Sync Pricing Models with Production
steps.description: Deploy your validated pricing logic to production using automated CI/CD triggers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Action deployment workflow that deploys pricing updates only if tests pass.

pro_tips: Always use feature branches for pricing experiments; never push pricing logic directly to main.
Store pricing tiers as environment-agnostic JSON files to allow for rapid hot-swapping without code deployments.
Implement 'dry-run' endpoints that allow you to test pricing calculations against real Stripe API keys without charging users.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to maintain consistent naming conventions across your entire codebase for easier debugging.
Set up automated alerts that notify you via Slack if a pricing calculation fails in production, even if the deployment succeeded.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Once your pricing logic is versioned, focus on building a recurring billing dashboard to give your clients real-time visibility into their SaaS revenue.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop playing amateur with your code and start acting like a top-tier engineer. Stop the chaos, start the automation, and scale your freelance business to new heights. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
